member.name: T:Sandbox.MovementPlus.ExternalMoveMode
member.summary: Base class for external move modes that plug into PlayerControllerPlus. Add as a component on the same GameObject as the player controller. Override Score to control when this mode activates (higher score wins). The default animation pipeline always runs; override UpdateAnimator to add extra animation on top.

member.name: M:Sandbox.MovementPlus.ExternalMoveMode.Score(Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus)
member.summary: Return a score to compete with built-in modes. Walk is 0, Ladder is 5, Swim is 10, Sit is 10000. Return negative to opt out.

member.name: M:Sandbox.MovementPlus.ExternalMoveMode.IsStandableSurface(Sandbox.SceneTraceResult@)
member.summary: Whether the given trace result is a surface the player can stand on. Default allows any surface within 45 degrees of flat.

member.name: M:Sandbox.MovementPlus.ExternalMoveMode.OnModeBegin
member.summary: Called when this mode becomes the active mode.

member.name: M:Sandbox.MovementPlus.ExternalMoveMode.OnModeEnd
member.summary: Called when this mode is being replaced by another mode.

member.name: M:Sandbox.MovementPlus.ExternalMoveMode.AddVelocity
member.summary: Add velocity to the physics body. Default does nothing (no physics-driven movement).

member.name: M:Sandbox.MovementPlus.ExternalMoveMode.UpdateRigidBody(Sandbox.Rigidbody)
member.summary: Configure the rigidbody for this mode. Default disables gravity and applies high damping.

member.name: M:Sandbox.MovementPlus.ExternalMoveMode.UpdateMove(Rotation,Vector3)
member.summary: Process movement input and return a wish velocity. Default returns zero.

member.name: M:Sandbox.MovementPlus.ExternalMoveMode.UpdateAnimator(Sandbox.SkinnedModelRenderer)
member.summary: Called after the default animation pipeline runs. Override to set extra animation parameters.

member.name: M:Sandbox.MovementPlus.ExternalMoveMode.GetEyeTransform
member.summary: Override to provide a custom eye transform. Return null to use the default calculation.

member.name: T:Sandbox.MovementPlus.ExternalMoveModeAdapter
member.summary: Wraps an ExternalMoveMode component so it can participate in the MoveModePlus system.

member.name: T:Sandbox.MovementPlus.MoveModePlus
member.summary: A move mode for this character. Not a Component — owned and managed by PlayerControllerPlus.

member.name: T:Sandbox.MovementPlus.ISitTarget
member.summary: A component that can be sat in by a player. If the player is parented to an object with this component, they will be sitting in it.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.Renderer
member.summary: The body will usually be a child object with SkinnedModelRenderer

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.ShowCreateBodyRenderer
member.summary: If true we'll show the "create body" button

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.AimStrengthEyes
member.summary: How strongly to look in the eye direction with our eyes

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.AimStrengthHead
member.summary: How strongly to turn in the eye direction with our head

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.AimStrengthBody
member.summary: How strongly to turn in the eye direction with our body

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.CrouchAnimationSpeed
member.summary: How fast the character model blends into the crouch pose. Higher = faster. Default (5) is stock.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.CrouchCameraSpeed
member.summary: How fast the camera height adjusts when crouching. Higher = faster. Default (50) is nearly instant.

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.UpdateAnimation(Sandbox.SkinnedModelRenderer)
member.summary: Update the animation for this renderer. This will update the body rotation etc too.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.EyeAngles
member.summary: The direction we're looking in input space.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.EyePosition
member.summary: The player's eye position, in first person mode

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.EyeTransform
member.summary: The player's eye transform, in first person mode

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IsDucking
member.summary: True if this player is ducking

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.Headroom
member.summary: The distance from the top of the head to the closest ceiling.

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.EnsureComponentsCreated
member.summary: Make sure the body and our components are created

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.UpdateBody
member.summary: Update the body dimensions, and change the physical properties based on the current state

member.name: T:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IEvents
member.summary: Events from the PlayerControllerPlus

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IEvents.OnEyeAngles(Angles@)
member.summary: Our eye angles are changing. Allows you to change the sensitivity, or stomp all together.

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IEvents.PostCameraSetup(Sandbox.CameraComponent)
member.summary: Called after we've set the camera up

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IEvents.OnJumped
member.summary: The player has just jumped

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IEvents.OnLanded(System.Single,Vector3)
member.summary: The player has landed on the ground, after falling this distance.

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IEvents.GetUsableComponent(Sandbox.GameObject)
member.summary: Used by the Using system to find components we can interact with. By default we can only interact with IPressable components. Return a component if we can use it, or else return null.

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IEvents.StartPressing(Sandbox.Component)
member.summary: We have started using something (use was pressed)

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IEvents.StopPressing(Sandbox.Component)
member.summary: We have stopped using something

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IEvents.FailPressing
member.summary: We pressed USE but it did nothing

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IEvents.PreInput
member.summary: We have a chance to do something before input is processed

member.name: F:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.DebugFootsteps
member.summary: Draw debug overlay on footsteps

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.PlayFootstepSound(Vector3,System.Single,System.Int32)
member.summary: Play a footstep sound at the given world position. Will only play if the player has a GroundSurface.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.GroundObject
member.summary: The object we're standing on. Null if we're standing on nothing.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.GroundComponent
member.summary: The collider component we're standing on. Null if we're standing nothing

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.GroundSurface
member.summary: If we're stnding on a surface this is it

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.GroundFriction
member.summary: The friction property of the ground we're standing on.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.GroundIsDynamic
member.summary: Are we standing on a surface that is physically dynamic

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.TimeSinceGrounded
member.summary: Amount of time since this character was last on the ground

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.TimeSinceUngrounded
member.summary: Amount of time since this character was last not on the ground

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.PreventGrounding(System.Single)
member.summary: Prevent being grounded for a number of seconds

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.Reground(System.Single)
member.summary: Lift player up and place a skin level above the ground

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.AccelerationTime
member.summary: Amount of seconds it takes to get from your current speed to your requuested speed, if higher

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.DeaccelerationTime
member.summary: Amount of seconds it takes to get from your current speed to your requuested speed, if lower

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.AltMoveButton
member.summary: The button that the player will press to use to run

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.RunByDefault
member.summary: If true then the player will run by default, and holding AltMoveButton will switch to walk

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.EnablePressing
member.summary: Allows to player to interact with things by "use"ing them. Usually by pressing the "use" button.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.UseButton
member.summary: The button that the player will press to use things

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.ReachLength
member.summary: How far from the eye can the player reach to use things

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.UseLookControls
member.summary: When true we'll move the camera around using the mouse

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.LookSensitivity
member.summary: Allows modifying the eye angle sensitivity. Note that player preference sensitivity is already automatically applied, this is just extra.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.SlowWalkButton
member.summary: The button that the player will press to slow walk

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.MoveRelativeToBody
member.summary: Movement input is relative to the player body's facing direction rather than the camera direction.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.DisableLookInput
member.summary: Prevents mouse input from changing the eye/camera angles.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.CurrentHeight
member.summary: Gets the current character height from when standing, otherwise uses when ducking.

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.UpdateDucking(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Called during FixedUpdate when UseInputControls is enabled. Will duck if requested. If not, and we're ducked, will unduck if there is room

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.ActiveExternalMode
member.summary: The currently active ExternalMoveMode component, or null if a built-in mode is active.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.Hovered
member.summary: The object we're currently looking at

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.Pressed
member.summary: The object we're currently using by holding down USE

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.Tooltips
member.summary: The tooltip of the currently hovered Pressable object

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.UpdateLookAt
member.summary: Called in Update when Using is enabled

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.UpdatePressed
member.summary: Called every frame to update our pressed object

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.UpdateHovered
member.summary: Called every frame to update our hovered status, unless it's being pressed

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.StopPressing
member.summary: Stop pressing. Pressed will become null.

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.StartPressing(Sandbox.Component)
member.summary: Start pressing a target component. This is called automatically when Use is pressed.

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.SwitchHovered(Sandbox.Component)
member.summary: Called every frame with the component we're looking at - even if it's null

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.TryGetLookedAt
member.summary: Get the best component we're looking at. We don't just return any old component, by default we only return components that implement IPressable. Components can implement GetUsableComponent to search and provide better alternatives.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.StepDebug
member.summary: Enable debug overlays for this character

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.TryStep(System.Single)
member.summary: Try to step up. Will trace forward, then up, then across, then down.

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.RestoreStep
member.summary: If we stepped up on the previous step, we suck our position back to the previous position after the physics step to avoid adding double velocity. This is technically wrong but doesn't seem to cause any harm right now

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.BodyBox(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Return an aabb representing the body

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.TraceBody(Vector3,Vector3,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Trace the aabb body from one position to another and return the result

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.CreateRagdoll(System.String)
member.summary: Create a ragdoll gameobject version of our render body.

member.name: F:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus._skin
member.summary: This is used to keep a distance away from surfaces. For example, when grounding, we'll be a skin distance away from the ground.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.BrakePower
member.summary: We will apply extra friction when we're on the ground and our desired velocity is lower than our current velocity, so we will slow down.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.AirFriction
member.summary: How much friction to add when we're in the air. This will slow you down unless you have a wish velocity.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.Inertia
member.summary: How much the character resists changes in movement direction. 0 = instant direction changes, 1 = very sluggish.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.PreserveVelocityOnLanding
member.summary: When enabled, horizontal velocity is preserved when landing instead of being braked immediately.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.ShowStats
member.summary: Show a debug overlay with velocity, move state, and grounded state.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.TrueFirstPerson
member.summary: In first person, render the body normally but make head/hair/hats shadow-only so they don't clip into the camera. Requires HideBodyInFirstPerson to be false.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.TrueFirstPersonOffset
member.summary: Offset from the head bone position for the first-person camera.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.DisableCameraBinding
member.summary: Completely decouples the camera from the player. The camera stays in place and the body only rotates toward its movement direction.

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IsAirborne
member.summary: Not touching the ground, and not swimming or climbing

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.Velocity
member.summary: Our actual physical velocity minus our ground velocity

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.GroundVelocity
member.summary: The velocity that the ground underneath us is moving

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IsClimbing
member.summary: Set to true when entering a climbing .

member.name: P:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.IsSwimming
member.summary: Set to true when entering a swimming .

member.name: M:Sandbox.PlayerControllerPlus.Jump(Vector3)
member.summary: Adds velocity in a special way. First we subtract any opposite velocity (ie, falling) then we add the velocity, but we clamp it to that direction. This means that if you jump when you're running up a platform, you don't get extra jump power.
